name: area: automation
description: GitHub workflows, templates, labels, and repository automation.

name: area: docs
description: Project documentation and contributor guidance.

name: area: source
description: Application or library source code.

name: area: tests
description: Automated tests and test infrastructure.

name: kind: bug
description: A defect or regression.

name: kind: docs
description: Documentation-only changes or issues.

name: kind: feature
description: A user-facing capability request.

name: kind: maintenance
description: Repository maintenance or infrastructure work.

name: prompt
description: Prompt design, prompt tuning, and prompt-quality discussion.

name: needs: compliance
description: The author or reporter needs to fix template or policy gaps.

name: needs: duplicate-review
description: Automation found similar existing work that needs maintainer review.

name: needs: linked-context
description: A pull request needs a linked issue or related pull request.

name: needs: title
description: A pull request title does not meet the repository title standard.

name: good first issue
description: A scoped task that is suitable for a first contribution.

name: help wanted
description: Maintainers would welcome a community contribution on this work.

name: status: needs-triage
description: Awaiting maintainer triage.

name: status: needs-author-feedback
description: Waiting on the author or reporter to provide more information.

name: status: ready-for-work
description: Triaged and ready for a contributor to claim.

name: status: in-progress
description: Claimed by a contributor and actively being worked.

name: status: awaiting-claimer-response
description: Waiting for the claimer to confirm continued work before auto-unclaim.

name: status: duplicate
description: Closed in favor of an existing canonical issue or pull request.

name: status: superseded
description: Closed because a newer pull request replaced it.

name: status: stale
description: Automatically marked stale due to inactivity.
